message:
refactor(tests): rename test variables in once_cell waker refresh test for clarity

Rename wake_a/wake_b/waker_a/waker_b to wake_counter_first/
wake_counter_second/task_waker_first/task_waker_second to make the
test's intent clearer: the first waker becomes stale when re-polled
with the second, and only the second should be notified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
